case_title: JUSTIN JACOBS VS. U-HAUL CO. OF CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL *AGENT FOR SERVICE: CT CORP. SYS* FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACOBS, JUSTIN AS TO DEFENDANT U-HAUL CO. OF CALIFORNIA
